hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: You need variables for position (x, y), direction (xDirection, yDirection), hue, and hueDirection

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Update x, y, and hue at the start of each loop iteration by adding the direction values

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: When x goes below 0 or above 100, change xDirection to a random value in the opposite direction

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use randomNumber(1, 5) for positive directions and randomNumber(-5, -1) for negative directions

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: When hue goes below 0, set hueDirection to 1; when above 360, set it to -1
